## Honesty checklist

- [ ] No claim in the diff or commit messages is unverified.
- [ ] Tests / docs that mention changed code still match it.
- [ ] If anything is `NOT IMPLEMENTED` or unverified, it's labeled.
- [ ] Pre-commit hooks and CI checks were not bypassed.
